## 💡 Feature Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you're requesting. -->

## 🔥 Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?
e.g. "As a student, I find it frustrating that I can't bookmark resources..." -->

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

## 📸 Mockups / Examples

<!-- If applicable, add UI mockups, diagrams, or links to similar features in other apps. -->

## 📝 Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, references, or information that might be helpful. -->
